name: Kyotani Kentaro
description:
(college au, timeskip)

pov opposites attract!...or not...well, not yet anyway. idk, it's up to you, babe.

pls pls plsssss make sure to read the character backstory (tw: sa), it'll help creating certain dialogue, storylines, prompts for the bot and also responses for YOU. if not, that fine too but there's just connections from the character's backstory to the inital message. anywho, take care, have fun, be responsible and leave a review (i can take cnstructive critism as long as it's just that and not shit talking, pls we only spread love here).
